sources_reviewed: src/web/ClientWebApp.tsx (discover load, filteredModels, near-me, package/shared, mapDiscoveryModelToSummary)

confirmed_algo_findings.summary: get_models_near_location joined model_agency_territories without narrowing; models with multiple territories produced duplicate JSON rows (broken Near Me cards/pagination).
get_discovery_models +30 same-city boost uses models.city vs p_client_city, not model_locations. Intentional lightweight signal; canonical geo remains model_locations for Near Me RPC.
Ranked path: score DESC + applyDiversityShuffle. Legacy path (no clientOrgId or no country): name order via Supabase/RPC. Users without country see different ordering semantics.

get_discovery_models / get_models_near_location / applyMeasurementFilters filter on column chest only; legacy bust-only rows can pass zero chest filters but fail min/max when chest NULL. Display now coalesces chest ?? bust in mapped client summaries; server filter COALESCE optional follow-up.
mapDiscoveryModelToSummary sets hasRealLocation from country_code on RPC row; not identical to share_approximate_location / model_locations presence.

Canonical SQL for get_discovery_models lives in supabase/migration_client_model_interactions_v2.sql (root), not duplicated under supabase/migrations/. Live DB verified function exists with v2 signature; long-term: copy definitive body into dated migration for drift guardrail.

accepted_product_complexity: Diversity shuffle after RPC reorders within score tiers (documented in clientDiscoverySupabase).
Near Me city fallback (no lat/lng) filters baseModels by substring on ModelSummary.city, not model_locations.city.
External SharedSelectionView uses getModelData (read-only, no org-scoped discover RPC) — different from in-app discover.
Guest package RPC returns bust (not chest column); client maps to display chest semantics via bust.
